The file has been written successfully.

- **File**: `/tmp/polsia-workspaces/company-956/agent-30/exec-67380/hireloop/client/src/pages/candidate/quick-practice.tsx`

The file contains the `QuickPractice` React component, which provides single-question video/text practice with AI analysis. It includes:

- Video recording with camera management (with iOS-specific handling and fallback constraint sets)
- Speech recognition / transcription during recording
- MediaRecorder for audio capture
- Text response mode as an alternative
- Video and text submission to AI coaching endpoints (with 35s AbortController timeout)
- Detailed coaching results display for both video (content, communication, presentation scores) and text (strengths, improvements, tips) modes
- Camera error handling with platform-specific troubleshooting instructions
